title: BEST INTEREST DECISION AFFIRMED Negotiated, Non-Competitive Addition to Existing Mineral Lease – Livengood
summary: MHT 9400248 MH Parcel F70536 Action: Adopt the Best Interest Decision dated September 9, 2024, regarding the above referenced disposal as final, without modification. This decision document, combined with the Best Interest Decision dated September 9, 2024, constitutes the final decision on this matter, in accordance with 11 AAC 99.040. Notice under 11 AAC 99.050 .
